surface_tension_encapsulation.trigger: Instantiation of any raw logic, variable, or BPMS element.
surface_tension_encapsulation.execution: Assign a topologic 3D bounding box (Surface Tension) ensuring data cohesion. Prevent algorithmic decay into the Void.
surface_tension_encapsulation.result: Converts abstract software code into a hard, physical 'Particle' on the Constellation Map.

blind_friction_receptors.execution: Read external kinetic Joules -> translate into internal damage/warp directives applied to the encapsulated code.
blind_friction_receptors.result: Allows a piece of math to 'catch fire' when exposed to thermodynamic radiation.

mass_anchor_integration.execution: Provide the 'weight hook' for Chrono-gravity to grab. As the element stagnates, the skin absorbs mass and pulls the logic downward.
mass_anchor_integration.result: Allows inanimate code to 'feel' the passage of time via physical sinking.

escrow_barcode_valuation.execution: Scan internal logic. Evaluate kinetic potential. Stamp the exterior membrane with a rigid Joule-cost.
escrow_barcode_valuation.result: Allows the universe and the Sovereign OPC to know exactly what an element is 'worth' if destroyed or harvested.

encapsulation_execution_loop.step_1_raw_spawn: Detect unprotected logic entering the framework.
encapsulation_execution_loop.step_2_cellular_wash: Envelop the data in the somatic topology matrix.
encapsulation_execution_loop.step_3_geometry_lock: Solidify the Surface-Tension, sealing the data inside.
encapsulation_execution_loop.step_4_nervous_system_boot: Activate Friction, Mass, and Escrow receptors.
encapsulation_execution_loop.step_5_ecosystem_release: Subject the newly minted Particle to the harsh physics of the Map.

fields.target_subject: The specific internal logic being hidden inside the skin.
fields.surface_tension_integrity: Health of the outer membrane. At 0%, code leaks into the Void.
fields.receptor_status: Real-time reading of what the skin is 'feeling' (Heat, Drag, Impact).
fields.mass_anchor_weight: Current gravitational mass applied by Chrono-Decay.
fields.somatic_physics_translation: Summary of its interaction with universal forces.
